This is a heritage paradise, apple tree, left over from the original David Barnes Orchard surrounding his original farmhouse. This Orchard is roughly 140 years old at this point, and a few survivors still stand in several backyards throughout the neighborhood.
Falling Fruit access: Added by owner.

Another one of the Apple trees from the original David Barnes Orchard, surrounding his original farmhouse. These are heritage trees, and are about 140 years old at this point. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: October-unknown.

This paradise apple tree is another one of the last survivors of the 140 year-old Apple Orchard planted by David Barnes, surrounding his original farmhouse in Loveland Colorado. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: September-unknown.
